retrieved.resolution: Automated reminders configurable in Settings > Notifications > Due Date Reminders. Options: 7d, 3d, 1d, same-day, overdue. Can set multiple. Also available per-project in project settings.

retrieved.subject: Best practices for setting up workflows
retrieved.body: We want to use Steadfast's workflow automation but need guidance on best practices. We have about 10 standard processes we want to automate — things like approval chains, task escalation, and notification rules. Where should I start? Any templates available?
retrieved.resolution: Sent our Workflow Best Practices guide (KB-1030). Recommended starting with their simplest process to learn the builder. Shared 5 workflow templates: approval chain, task escalation, SLA notification, onboarding sequence, and review cycle. Key tip: test workflows in their sandbox workspace first. Offered a workflow design session.

retrieved.subject: First time setting up — need guidance
retrieved.body: Hi, we just signed up for Steadfast last week and I'm the admin responsible for getting everything set up. Feeling a bit overwhelmed. We have about 80 users to onboard. Where should I start? Is there a recommended setup sequence?
retrieved.resolution: Sent our Admin Onboarding Checklist (KB-1001). Recommended sequence: 1) Configure workspace settings, 2) Set up permission groups, 3) Create project templates, 4) Invite pilot group (5-10 users), 5) Run pilot for 1 week, 6) Full rollout. Offered a free onboarding call with our CS team. Scheduled for Thursday.

evaluation.response_score_reason: Accurately conveys the plan restriction from KB, offers the correct Starter alternative (workflow automation rules/tags), and mentions the upgrade path and automation guide — all directly supported by TK-0792, with no invented facts.

As a workaround, you can build these in our Custom Report Builder and schedule it to land alongside your weekly Pulse Check. We can also add your account to the Pulse Check customization beta list if you'd like early access as that expands.

retrieved.subject: Can we customize the Pulse Check metrics?
retrieved.body: The default Pulse Check report includes metrics like task velocity and completion rate but we'd like to add custom KPIs — specifically regulatory submission tracking and audit trail completeness. Is it possible to add custom metrics to Pulse Check, or do we need to build a separate report?
retrieved.resolution: Currently Pulse Check supports only the default metric set (velocity, completion rate, overdue %, active contributors). Custom metrics are on the roadmap (FR-3001). Workaround: create a custom report with the additional KPIs and schedule it to run alongside Pulse Check. Shared our Custom Report Builder guide. Added customer to the Pulse Check customization beta list.

retrieved.subject: Can we get a walkthrough of the reporting features?
retrieved.body: Our team wants to better understand the reporting capabilities in Steadfast. We're not using reports much right now but our management wants regular project status updates. Can someone give us a tour of what's available?
retrieved.resolution: Scheduled a 30-minute reporting walkthrough. Covered: built-in report templates, custom report builder, scheduled report delivery, and dashboard widgets. Shared our Reporting Best Practices guide (KB-1060). Customer set up 3 recurring reports.

retrieved.subject: Need information about our SLA terms
retrieved.body: We're doing an internal review of all our vendor SLAs and need detailed information about our current SLA with Steadfast. Specifically: uptime guarantees, response time commitments, penalty clauses for SLA breaches, and the escalation process. Can you send us the full SLA document?
retrieved.resolution: Sent the Enterprise SLA document (v2024). Key terms: 99.95% uptime guarantee, 15-min response for P1 issues, 2-hour response for P2, service credits for SLA breaches (10% credit per 0.1% below target). Also sent the escalation matrix and quarterly SLA compliance report for their account.

retrieved.subject: Can we get a breakdown of our usage statistics?
retrieved.body: For our quarterly vendor review, we need detailed usage statistics for our Steadfast account: active users, tasks created, projects active, storage used, API call volume. Is there a dashboard or report for this?
retrieved.resolution: Generated a custom usage report from Admin > Analytics > Account Usage. Included: 487 active users (of 500 seats), 12,340 tasks created this quarter, 89 active projects, 45GB storage used, 1.2M API calls. Exported as PDF and CSV. Set up quarterly auto-report delivery to their admin email.
